name: baoyu-skills-codex
description: Baoyu's Codex-ready skill collection for content creation, publishing, and utility workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Content, publishing, and utility skills for Codex
interface.longDescription: A Codex-focused adaptation of Baoyu's skill collection for image generation, publishing workflows, Markdown processing, translation, slides, infographics, and browser-assisted content tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use baoyu-imagine to generate a batch of images from saved prompt files
Use baoyu-post-to-wechat to prepare a WeChat article draft from Markdown
Use baoyu-url-to-markdown to capture a web page as clean Markdown
